The HTTP method (Get, Post, Put, Delete,

The endpoint name (PascalCase, e.g.

options.description: The permission name (e.g. OrdersCreate)

options.name: --response-type
options.description:
The response type (SingleResult or
PaginatedResult)

options.name: --route
options.description:
The route pattern (e.g. /orders,
/orders/{id})

The endpoint name (PascalCase, e.g. Login,

options.name: --endpoint

The endpoint name (PascalCase, e.g. Login, CreateOrder).

options.description:
The group name (PascalCase, e.g. Orders or
Authentication/Mobile). Required for Group and Endpoint scope.

options.name: --name

ProcessPayment)

options.name: --scope

options.name: --type
options.description: The job type (Simple or WithArgs)

options.name: --name
options.description: The entity name (PascalCase)
